queries.name: twisted_mote2_fractional_topology
queries.query: all:"twisted MoTe2" AND ("fractional Chern" OR "fractional quantum anomalous Hall" OR FQAH OR "fractional quantum spin Hall" OR FQSH OR "fractional topological insulator" OR FTI)

queries.name: twisted_mote2_optics_magnetooptics
queries.query: all:"twisted MoTe2" AND (optical OR photoluminescence OR RMCD OR MCD OR dichroism OR trion OR "pump-probe" OR "optical switching")

queries.name: twisted_bilayer_mote2_phase_evolution
queries.query: all:"twisted bilayer MoTe2" AND ("twist-angle" OR superconductivity OR "Chern insulator" OR "phase diagram" OR "composite Fermi liquid")

queries.name: mote2_wse2_phase_transitions
queries.query: all:"MoTe2/WSe2" AND (QAH OR MCD OR compressibility OR "phase transition" OR topological)

queries.name: twisted_mote2_multiband_and_multilayer
queries.query: all:"twisted MoTe2" AND (multiband OR multilayer OR "second flat Chern band" OR "band reordering" OR DSRG)

queries.name: twisted_mote2_superconducting_neighborhood
queries.query: all:"twisted MoTe2" AND (superconductivity OR "holon metal" OR "chiral superconductor" OR "normal state")
